Bookkeeper / Financial Administrator: Records transactions and prepares reports if assigned.. Finance Committee: Owns budget monitoring, variance review, budget exceptions, and recommendations.. Personnel Committee: Reviews staffing and compensation budget implications.. Nominating Committee: No primary role.. Pastor: Consults on ministry priorities and operational needs.. Deacons: Reviews major budget matters if church practice requires.. Congregation: Approves annual budget and major budget changes if required.. Responsibility Area: Monthly reporting. Treasurer: Presents or helps present financial reports; reviews reconciliations and exceptions.. Bookkeeper / Financial Administrator: Prepares report packet, reconciliations, and supporting documentation if assigned.. Finance Committee: Owns monthly financial review and follow-up.. Personnel Committee: Receives personnel-related financial information only as appropriate.. Nominating Committee: No role.. Pastor: Receives or reviews reports as needed for leadership.. Deacons: Receives updates if church practice requires.. Congregation: Receives business meeting reports as appropriate.. Responsibility Area: Annual audit / financial review. Treasurer: Coordinates records and responds to reviewer questions.. Bookkeeper / Financial Administrator: Provides records, reports, and documentation if assigned.. Finance Committee: Owns recommendation, scope, timing, reviewer selection, and follow-up.. Personnel Committee: Consults if review affects staff roles or accountability.. Nominating Committee: No role.. Pastor: Consults and supports leadership communication.. Deacons: Reviews findings if church practice requires.. Congregation: Votes if bylaws, budget, or policy require outside review approval.. Responsibility Area: Credit card / controlled payment policy. Treasurer: Reviews card activity and helps enforce policy.. Bookkeeper / Financial Administrator: Maintains receipts, coding, and transaction records if assigned; may hold a card only if approved.. Finance Committee: Owns card/payment policy, limits, cardholder approval, review, suspension, and revocation process.. Personnel Committee: Consults on employee/volunteer accountability and role expectations.. Nominating Committee: No role.. Pastor: May hold card or approve ministry purchases if policy allows.. Deacons: Reviews policy or exceptions if church practice requires.. Congregation: Votes if policy, budget, or liability concern requires.. Responsibility Area: Spending outside budget. Treasurer: Flags concern and seeks approval before payment when practical.. Bookkeeper / Financial Administrator: Does not process payment until approval path is documented, except emergency process if policy allows.. Finance Committee: Leads review and recommendation; determines funding source and budget impact.. Personnel Committee: Consults if staffing or compensation is involved.. Nominating Committee: No role.. Pastor: Consults on ministry urgency or operational need.. Deacons: Reviews if leadership practice or amount requires.. Congregation: Votes if bylaws, budget, amount, or church policy require.. Responsibility Area: Emergency spending. Treasurer: Helps confirm need, documentation, and after-the-fact review.. Bookkeeper / Financial Administrator: Processes only after emergency approval is documented.. Finance Committee: Defines emergency authority and reviews after the fact.. Personnel Committee: No primary role unless staff accountability is involved.. Nominating Committee: No role.. Pastor: May authorize within policy if delay would create harm or prevent urgent ministry need.. Deacons: May authorize or review within policy if assigned.. Congregation: Receives report or votes afterward if required.. Responsibility Area: Business meeting financial report. Treasurer: Presents or helps present report and answer questions.. Bookkeeper / Financial Administrator: Prepares supporting packet if assigned.. Finance Committee: Reviews report before presentation.. Personnel Committee: No primary role.. Nominating Committee: No role.. Pastor: Supports communication and framing.. Deacons: Reviews if church practice requires.. Congregation: Receives, discusses, and votes on items requiring action..
